stages.title: Truth infrastructure - sv2 scoring + committed research tools
stages.notes: Deliver S0 per PLAN.md section 3 S0. (1) Replace ComputeFtmoSurvival with ChallengeSimulator-backed survival, versioned sv2 (sv1 rows untouched); unit tests pin 0/N->0, N/N->1, daily-cap dominates. (2) Port quant_research.py + split_half.py to tools/research/, add a `research persistence` CLI verb. (3) Create LEDGER.md + expand TRACKER.md (alpha-loop format). Gate G0: sv2 tests green; `research persistence --experiment 075D5240 --split 2025-12-03` reproduces the RESEARCH.md F64 numbers (+/-$1); fast suites green.

stages.title: Exit-layer factorial - which exit component is real, per family
stages.notes: Deliver S1 per PLAN.md section 3 S1 + D5 anti-overfit discipline. Per family (trend-breakout, then ema-alignment, super-trend, mean-reversion contrast): pre-register <=8 variants in the ledger BEFORE running; one-cell-per-run (D13), sv2-scored; evaluate at FAMILY level (pooled expR delta, sign consistency, split-half both-halves-positive, MFE-capture/giveback); walk-forward the best variant. Execute the mtf-trend park decision (D7) either way. Gate G1: per-family ledger verdict with the pasted family-level table (all three D5 legs).

stages.title: Entry noise floor + regime gating
stages.notes: Deliver S2 per PLAN.md section 3 S2. Pre-register: (a) SpreadVolNoTradeFilter / session-window filters cut never-ran rate without cutting pooled expR; (b) regime-conditioning as an analysis on EXISTING census trades first (no new runs) - only a large conditional split earns a filter variant. Gate G2: never-ran + pooled expR deltas per family; regime-conditioning table; any surviving filter meets D5 in full.

stages.title: Cost-aware knobs - swap/commission structural rules
stages.notes: Deliver S3 per PLAN.md section 3 S3 (may merge into S1/S2 if effects small). Pre-registered: swap-aware hold-cap/flatten for multi-day families (rsi-divergence 87h median) + per-trade expectancy floor for high-frequency families; evaluate net-vs-gross gap delta at family level, D5. Gate G3: cost-drag table (gross/commission/swap/net) before vs after, pasted.

stages.title: Re-census under the winning structural config
stages.notes: Deliver S4 per PLAN.md section 3 S4. Full R1'-shaped census (one cell per run, D13 null-with-reason, sv2) under the S1-S3 surviving config as the new default; walk-forward the top decile. The census-level pooled expR is the headline, not any cell rank. Gate G4: census complete with the D13 query pasted; pooled expR vs the 075D5240 baseline; top-decile walk-forward table.

stages.title: EMBARGO-2 dress rehearsal - first touch of post-2026-07-05 data
stages.notes: Deliver S5 per PLAN.md section 3 S5 + D3. GATE ON DATA: do NOT run before >=45 accrued days after 2026-07-05 exist (60 complete ~2026-09-04); if not yet accrued, park with reason. First & only touch of embargo data; run S4 survivors AND the family-level pooled config; sv2 windows; report R4-format candidate cards. The pooled family verdict matters more than any cell. Gate G5: candidate cards + pooled-family embargo table. No re-touch, no re-tune.

stages.title: Portfolio phase (CONDITIONAL on >=1 rule-level edge holding at G5)
stages.notes: Deliver S6 per PLAN.md section 3 S6 - ONLY if G5 showed a rule-level edge held; otherwise skip. (1) Paper-aggregation with joint-tail metrics (worst combined day, tail co-occurrence), not Pearson. (2) Portfolio risk machinery: dedicated risk profile, ExposureGroups by currency/asset, per-cell attribution in one multi-row run. (3) One real multi-row tape run; reconcile attribution vs solo runs; ChallengeSimulator at 1x/1.5x/2x. Gate G6: aggregate challenge table + attribution reconciliation pasted.

stages.title: Final audit + close - R5-style artifact audit
stages.notes: Deliver S7 per PLAN.md section 3 S7. Fresh session audits every stage against PLAN.md from artifacts; compile a <=5-item bugfix queue; update AGENTS.md RESUME; hand the owner pack. Apply the section 6 stop rule verdict if S1-S4 found no structural edge.
